command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Full current telegram channel config ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
print(json.dumps(d.get('channels',{}).get('telegram',{}), indent=2))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Check OpenClaw docs/schema for telegram.groups format ==="
find /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "groups" 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo "--- search for groups schema in telegram docs ---"
grep -rA8 "telegram.*groups\|groups.*telegram\|channels.telegram.groups" /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/ 2>/dev/null | head -25

echo ""
echo "=== Look for an example of the groups structure ==="
grep -rB2 -A10 '"groups"' /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/ 2>/dev/null | head -30
REMOTE
